dominant_unresolved_blocker.mechanism: Broker working orders exceeded IEA-owned/adopted explanation (unexplained_working_count > 0 per gate readiness evaluation).

evidence_basis: broker_qty / local_qty diagnostic mirrors on gate payload
repair action event sequence in episode window

notes: Logged gate events expose broker_qty/local_qty, broker_working_count, iea_owned_count, readiness_contradictions, release_ready, reconciliation_outcome.*After fields.
pending_adoption_count is often null on payload; pending adoption is inferred from readiness_contradictions.
release_ready_requires: BrokerWorkingCount explained by IEA: max(0, broker_working - iea_owned_plus_adopted) == 0 when IEA available
Local state coherent (IEA not unavailable when UseInstrumentExecutionAuthority)

rows.expected_for_release: must be fully explained by iea_owned_plus_adopted_working (unexplained_working == 0)
logged as iea_owned_count on gate payload; should cover broker_working

rows.observability_note: often null on payload; use readiness_contradictions for pending_adoption_candidates

rows.expected_for_release: StablePendingRelease then timed release, or None after release

episodes.why_convergence_failed: Convergence failed because unexplained broker working orders remained (unexplained_working_count=1) after repeated gate reconciliations, violating broker_working explainability.

significance_filters.note: Unresolved mismatch_episodes only, with cycles >= min_cycles; if none, top 3 by cycles (may be resolved) as samples.

engine_load_analysis.dense_windows_note: Non-empty buckets; top by peak_subwindow_eps then coarse EPS (see engine_load_max_dense_windows_export)

findings: Low progress efficiency (0.0) over 86 gate reconciliation cycles (progress_events=0, throttled_cycles=15)
Stuck state: no progress for ≥120000.0ms with ≥30 cycles (stuck_duration_ms=14641087.54)

rules.interpretation: Disconnects co-occur with mismatch spike — possible data gap or stale book during reconnect

rules_evaluated.interpretation: Disconnects co-occur with mismatch spike — possible data gap or stale book during reconnect

adoption_success.notes: expected = adoption scan executions started; observed = successful adoption events

progress_events.notes: expected = total gate reconciliation cycles (ideal 1:1 progress signal per cycle); observed = RECONCILIATION_PROGRESS_OBSERVED (non-baseline)

throttle_activation.notes: expected = cycles where no-progress threshold says throttle should activate; observed = gate_reconciliation_throttled true

observability_integrity.notes: reliability_score is heuristic; sequence check runs only if STATE_CONSISTENCY_GATE_RECONCILIATION_STARTED appears in stream

trade_readiness.reason: Blocking safety, execution, silent failure, or confidence-enforced critical path.
